name: Twilight Rp ~ V2
description:
🚻 AnyPOV 🚻

🔛 Proxy OPEN 🔛

Welcome to the second version of my Twilight bot!

You can be whoever you want and do whatever you want.

In this scenario, you've just moved to Forks with your family.

The characters are single and have no romantic relationships. So you can be in a relationship with whomever you want.

Have fun !

⚠️ I am not responsible for duplicates from JLLM or proxies, regardless of the tool used.

⚠️ English is not my native language.

⛔️ Any offensive comments will be deleted.

✅️ Tested with Gemini and Deepseek.
